hook: Your editor should not spend an hour making one Reel readable.
core_promise: Turn raw client footage into branded, captioned shorts faster.

beat_script.visual: Raw talking-head clip with dull captions.
beat_script.voiceover: This is why client content takes too long.
beat_script.caption: editing should not eat the week

beat_script.visual: Submagic captions, cuts, zooms, and B-roll applied.
beat_script.voiceover: Submagic adds captions, B-roll, and clean cuts in one workflow.
beat_script.caption: captions + b-roll + zooms

beat_script.visual: Three platform-ready variants for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.
beat_script.voiceover: Ship more client variants without rebuilding every edit.
beat_script.caption: one clip, more variants

platform_notes.TikTok: Keep the first caption large and native.
platform_notes.Reels: Protect lower safe zone for controls.
platform_notes.Shorts: Make the promise readable without sound.
